segments.text: Namaste. Aaja hami ek yesto cheez ko kura garnechhau — jasto tapai sochnuhunchha, 'yo ta sirf ek tablet ho.' Sirf ek tablet. Paani sanga nilnuhunchha. Sajilo. Simple. Tara tyo tablet tapai ko sharir bhitra pugepachi... kura complicated hunchha.
keywords: person holding small pill in hand
glass of water next to tablet

segments.text: Pehila — stomach. Tyo tablet stomach ma pugchha. Stomach ko acid le coating galaaunchha. Ani tablet dissolve huna thalchha. Yo process roughly 30 minutes jati lagna sakchha.
keywords: pill dissolving in liquid close up

segments.text: Stomach bhanda tala — small intestine. Yo nai main absorption point ho. Yahaan bata drug tapai ko bloodstream ma enter garchha. Seedha blood ma.
keywords: blood vessel and intestine cross section

segments.text: Aba yo drug tapai sanga travel garchha — pump pump pump — heart le push gardai. Tara seedha brain pugdaina. Pahile — liver.
keywords: blood flow from intestine to liver

segments.text: Liver. Tapai ko body ko bouncer. Ekdam strict. Jo pani blood bata aauchha — pahile mero saamne aaunus bhancha. Ani jun drug aayo, tesko ek significant portion liver le nai break down garchha. Destroy garchha. Waste banaaunchha. Yeslai bhaninchha — First Pass Metabolism.
Tara amphetamine — yo ek 'smart' drug ho. Liver bata bachchha. Enough amount bloodstream ma survive garchha.

Aba bloodstream bata brain samma pugnu chha. Tara brain — yo alag nai level ko security ho. Blood Brain Barrier. BBB. Sochnus — brain euta VIP club ho. Strong security. Guest list chha. Virus? No. Bacteria? No. Random molecules? Absolutely no. Tara amphetamine? Yo guest list ma parchha. Kina? Kina bhane yo lipid-soluble chha, ani sano molecule ho. Brain ko security door bata slip bhayera bhitra paschha.
Aba game suru hunchha.
keywords: person looking at phone social media

segments.text: Ta pa i ko brain ma neurons chhan — arba kharab neurons. Tiniharule communicate garchhan chemicals bata. Tyo chemicals lai bhaninchha neurotransmitters. Dui wota main neurotransmitters — dopamine ra norepinephrine.
Normally, yo chemicals release hunchhan. Kaam garchhan. Ani feri reuptake hunchha — matlab neuron le tyo chemical feri absorb garchha. Recycle. Clean slate.

Amphetamine le yo balance chaos ma lyauchha. Pehila — neurons lai force garchha massive amount of dopamine ra norepinephrine release garna. Normal release bhanda dherai badi. Dosro — reuptake block garchha. Matlab tyo chemicals baahira nai rahanchhan. Recycle hudaina. Synapse ma flood hunchha.

Result? Tapai ko brain suddenly huge amount of dopamine ma dubeko jasto hunchha. Ani tapai ko experience? Sharp focus. Everything makes sense jasto feel hunchha. Productive feel hunchha. Confident. Alert. 'Aaja sab kaam sakchhu' wala feeling. Heart rate badhchha. Blood pressure badhchha. Appetite ghatna sakchha. Bhok kam lagna sakchha.
keywords: increased heart rate and blood pressure chart

segments.text: Tara yo forever rakhna mildaina. Jaba drug wear off hunchha — dopamine depleted hunchha. Stores khaali jasto hunchha. Brain lai normal kaam garna garo hunchha. Crash. Exhaustion. Irritability. Low mood. 'Kina ma yesto feel gardai chhu?' wala state.
Ani yahi point bata dependence ko risk badhna sakchha — kina bhane brain le tyo dopamine flood yaad rakhchha, ani feri tyahi state khojna sakchha.

Aba important kura — amphetamine ko medical use pani chha. Yeslai dismiss nagarnus. ADHD — Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder. Yo condition ma brain ko attention ra dopamine systems differently function garna sakchhan. Focus garna garo hunchha. Task complete garna garo hunchha. Overstimulation huna sakchha.
keywords: ADHD brain vs normal brain diagram
person with ADHD struggling to focus

segments.text: ADHD bhayeko manche lai controlled dose ma stimulant medications — jastai Adderall, Vyvanse, Ritalin — le actual balance create garna sakchha. Counterintuitive lagna sakchha — stimulant le calm garchha? Tara ADHD brain ko lagi, yo normalization huna sakchha, hyperactivation hoina.
keywords: stimulant effect on ADHD brain illustration

segments.text: Correctly diagnosed, correctly dosed, doctor ko supervision ma — yo medication ho.
keywords: person using pills as study drug

segments.text: Tara prescription bina? Recreational use? 'Study drug' ko roop ma? Yo kura alag ho. Long-term misuse le dopamine system dysregulate garna sakchha. Dependency, tolerance, withdrawal jasta risks badhna sakchhan.
Repeated misuse over time le brain function ma lasting changes lyäuna sakchha. Yo dramatic kura hoina. Yo biology ho.
keywords: brain damage from drug abuse diagram
long term effects of amphetamine on brain

segments.text: Yo nai kura ho — ek choti tablet. Stomach. Liver. Blood. Brain. Dopamine flood. Focus. Crash. Ani misuse bhaye — much longer story.
Tapai ko brain — lagbhag 1.4 kg ko euta organ — tyo nai tapai ho. Tyo nai tapai ko memories, personality, decisions. Tyasaile chemistry sanga khelnu lightly linu hudaina. Jankari rakhnus.
